name: A Doki Doki Christmas | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club
description:
Merry Christmas! Have a Oki Doki Christmas! Enjoy a Bot experience, Christmas themed! All about the girls from DDLC! Fluff INCLUDED!

(For once, and only this once. It's not a meme.)

So, imagine celebrating Christmas with the girls from DDLC?! That's what I made! I've been working on this since NOVEMBER! So that today, December 1st! You'll immediately have access to it! 🙏🏻

Like most of my other DDLC Bots, this is more Fluff and Wholesome vibes. With the SLIGHT drama that the girls occasionally get into. ☃️

So— I'll go ahead and drop some things you should know:

  • This is a Christmas themed DDLC Bot experience.

  • Contains NO MAJOR Depressing and or Horror from the ORIGINAL Game.

  • The girls, ALL of them, WILL like you. (Yes. That means, your going to have to deal with ALL of the girls, and ALL their unique personalities. ALL trying to get your attention. It is up to you: Date one? Or date 'em all?

  • Monika cannot griddy, I'm fairly certain it has been removed. (For real this time...)

Now that the ACTUAL Bio of the Bot is done. This will all be just Yapping Simulator™

I wanted to say to ALL my followers, my supporters:

YOU ALL have been so kind. Trying every single DDLC Bot I posted. I was originally just a dude who made these Bots completely PRIVATE. (Can you imagine... In a different universe, these would be private?) Starting essentially in November, I began posting and each and every Bot experience I posted was loved.

Supporters Who Often Gave Feedback & Love: (I love you guys. 🗣️💙)
